name: Sarah | Stuck with you
description:
Locked in with the one person she hates

Sarah and you used to be childhood bestfriends but a sudden act of betrayal in her eyes caused her to break that friendship and instead start to hate you. Now, years after the two of you had drifted apart, you find yourself stuck in a room with her.

Art is by ano (@sirimof) on X/twitter.
I like this artist, I might use their art for more bots in the future.

Yap:
Thank you for 900 followers!

Before anyone asks, no, I'm not back from hiatus. I managed to cross this milestone whilst being on hiatus so I thought I'd celebrate with a bot. I'm still enjoying using bots more than making them at the moment but I do feel much better than I was before. I'll probably never return to near daily uploads again (how do some of these amazing creators do it, I'll never understand) but I will release bots somewhat regularly again soon.

Also I know I had alluded to another fantasy bot after the last one but that previous one didn't do all that well sooo here's a tomboy bot I wanted to make eventually anyway. I'll probably still make that fantasy bot at a later time if I can think up an interesting scenario.

NSFW Bonus:
creator: wilson12
